title: Event Envelope v1
description: Canonical envelope for domain events. Wrap your domain payload in `data`. See EVENT_SCHEMA.md for field rules.

id.description: Unique per event; UUIDv7 or ULID so it sorts by creation time. Used by consumers to deduplicate.

type.description: Event name. Past tense, PascalCase, scoped to one aggregate (e.g., OrderPaid).

version.description: Schema version of `data`. Bump on breaking changes.

occurredAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the fact became true (not when it was published).

publishedAt.description: Optional. When the event was handed to the broker.

causationId.description: The id of the command or event that directly caused this event. Null only for root events.

correlationId.description: The id of the root event/command that started the flow. Constant across a saga.

metadata.description: Optional flat bag for tracing, tenancy, actor. Keep keys namespaced if you share across teams.

data.description: Domain payload. Validate with the per-event schema (data-<type>-v<version>.json).
